title: LabFlow Lab Message v0
description: Inbound lab-result transmission from an upstream sender. One message triggers one workflow run.

schema_version.description: Contract version. Must be lab-message-v0 for this schema.

message_id.description: Sender-assigned unique ID for this transmission. Idempotency key; retried deliveries must reuse the same value.

patient_ref.description: Opaque patient correlation ID from the upstream system. Use non-PHI placeholders in development.

observations.description: Numeric lab results included in this message.

code.description: Analyte identifier. v0 supports potassium, sodium, and glucose.

value.description: Numeric result as reported by the upstream lab.

unit.description: Measurement unit as reported by the upstream lab (for example mmol/L).
